resources.string: Claude & Codex quota at a glance, from your UsageMeter sync endpoint.
Point this at the same sync endpoint your Mac UsageMeter publishes to. The easiest way is to scan the QR code shown in UsageMeter’s sync (📡) panel.
Saved. Add the “AI Usage” widget to your home screen.
Not configured yet — scan the QR or paste your sync URL.
Camera permission is needed to scan the QR code.
Point at the QR code in UsageMeter’s sync panel
Show a small app-icon–sized glyph that blends into your icon grid, instead of the full detailed card.
